docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-26-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF ALL PARTIES TO APR-12-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF NELSON BORGES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CORY WILSON-DIAZ IS PRESENT. PARTIES PARTICIPATED IN MEDIATION PROGRAM AND WERE STILL INTERESTED IN RESOLVING DISPUTE AMICABLY, BUT RAN OUT OF TIME AS CALENDAR ENDED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO APR-12-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506

ORDER RE: CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PARTIES (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-10-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO FEB-26-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF NELSON BORGES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CORY WILSON-DIAZ IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CARL CHAMBERLIN; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-12-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-14-2018 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF NELSON BORGES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CORY WILSON-DIAZ IS PRESENT. PARTIES HAVE REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NEXT HEARING ON MAY 14TH, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,400.00 FILED BY BORGES, NELSON AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON-DIAZ, CORY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-10-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. PER LAST HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED IF NO APPEARANCES AT THIS HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/9/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
